title: zamiaceae
intro: The Zamiaceae rank is a family of plants, specifically a group of evergreen, woody plants that are part of the cycad family. This family is characterized by its palm-like appearance and is often referred to as the "living fossils" due to their ancient lineage. The Zamiaceae family includes approximately 50-60 species and is found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. They are known for their long-lived, slow-growing nature and are often used as ornamental plants in gardens and landscapes.
